intro i
  -- Prove that each component measure is a probability measure.
  by_cases h : (i : Fin n).val = (i : Fin n).val
  · -- Case: diagonal entry (μ)
    have h₁ : (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n i) = μ := by
      simp [wignerMeasureDist, h]
      <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    rw [h₁]
    exact inferInstance
  · -- Case: off-diagonal entry (ν)
    have h₁ : (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n i) = ν := by
      simp [wignerMeasureDist, h]
      <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    rw [h₁]
    exact inferInstance
